description: Taking its place at the entrance of a series known for its unparalleled volume, innovative functionality and intelligent layout, the FD75 is a remarkable achievement in terms of design and naval architecture. Intended for owner/operators, the FD75 features a raised pilothouse design that accommodates both an open bridge and a lower helm area. The FD75 is a four-stateroom yacht, which includes a full-beam, on-deck master stateroom fitted with an en suite and walk-in closets, and three spacious staterooms comprised of a queen, double and twin on the lower deck. Accommodations for two crew members are found aft, and a beach club is optional. **Please note that this listing represents a model specification for a new build and not an actual hull for sale or vessel location. For more information on this model and build availability, please contact us**

description: Pristine, one-owner 2022 Cobalt R4 bowrider with just 79 hours - a meticulously kept, heavily optioned sterndrive that looks, runs, and presents like a brand-new boat. It was ordered with $35,865 in factory upgrades and finished with a Cobalt E2 R-Series rotating tower sunshade post-acquisition from Slalom Shop, for roughly $185,000 all in (see attached purchase build sheets from Slalom Shop). At 79 hours, this boat is essentially broken in with a full lifetime of seasons ahead of it. Power comes from a Volvo Penta V8-350 (350 HP) duoprop sterndrive with stainless FH5 props, trim tabs with indicators, and through-prop exhaust. The boat measures 24'3" length overall with the swim platform and an 8'6" beam, built on Cobalt's Kevlar-reinforced hull with a composite transom and fiberglass stringer system, with a 50-gallon fuel tank and certified capacity for 13. This R4 is genuinely loaded. The helm features upgraded dual oversized Garmin 8610 glass-cockpit displays, a premium sound system with transom and arch speakers, a six-speaker Bluetooth setup with app-based remote, a depth and water-temp package, and a wireless phone charger. Up top is a white folding arch (97" bridge clearance) plus the aftermarket Cobalt rotating tower sunshade, roughly $6,000 installed by Slalom Shop. The interior is the Caramel/Carbon scheme with the Dark Driftwood trim package, a Del Mar helm captain's chair, a flip-backrest passenger seat, Varadense Comfort seating throughout, a three-position convertible sundeck lounger, a bow walk-thru door with center cushion insert, dual molded-in ice chests, and full aftermarket SeaDeck flooring color-matched to the upholstery. It also carries a powered windlass with all-chain anchor, stainless docking lights, a stainless ski pylon, the patented flip-down swim step, a bow shade sail for Texas summers, a flagpole, a dual battery switch with ACR, and a Transhield cover. Condition is the headline here. Zero seat tears, zero exterior damage - truly pristine inside and out. The boat has been ceramic coated twice (2023 and 2026), always dry-stored under cover, and never kept in a slip. Complete service records from Slalom Shop are available upon request (listing wouldn't allow me to attach as PDF's), with all work performed by the selling Cobalt dealer (Slalom Shop) and fully verifiable. Within the last 30 days it received four new trailer tires and two new batteries, and the trailer is included in the sale. The value is straightforward: a comparably equipped new R4 sterndrive today can run well over $200,000. This one delivers an essentially new boat - fully sorted, with the steep early-year depreciation already absorbed - at $129,900. Cobalt's reputation for best-in-class build quality and resale is exactly why a boat kept to this standard is worth a serious look. Why am I selling? Honestly, I don't want to and I don't need to - I love this boat. But the kids have aged out of it and we are shifting toward traveling more, which is exactly why the hours are so low. It has been a phenomenal boat and it deserves an owner who will get out and enjoy it. A note on process, so we both save time: serious, funded buyers only. I am glad to answer questions and show the boat. Before a sea trial, I ask that we agree on price, and that financed buyers provide lender pre-approval and cash buyers provide proof of funds - standard practice that respects everyone's time. The boat is exceptional and priced accordingly, and serious offers will be given full consideration. Happy to show the boat in it’s dry storage location (Grapevine) prior to an offer being extended and sea-trial completed. Located in the Dallas/Fort Worth, Texas area (Grapevine, Texas). Hull ID: FGER4096C222. Accommodations Premium open-bowrider seating in the Caramel/Carbon scheme with the Dark Driftwood trim package and Varadense Comfort upholstery throughout - pristine, with zero tears. Del Mar helm captain's chair, flip-backrest passenger seat, wrap-around bow lounge with walk-thru door and center cushion insert, and a three-position convertible sundeck lounger aft. Full aftermarket SeaDeck flooring color-matched to the upholstery, snap-in cockpit carpet, folding arch with bimini, bow shade sail, and a Cobalt rotating tower sunshade for all-day comfort and shade. Mechanical Equipment Volvo Penta V8-350-CE 350 HP duoprop sterndrive with stainless FH5 props, trim tabs with indicators, and through-prop exhaust. 50-gallon EPA fuel tank, dual battery switch with ACR, and a circuit-breaker-protected electrical system. Two new batteries installed within the last 30 days. Just 72 hours, with complete service records from the selling Cobalt dealer (Slalom Shop). Service Records attached to listing Galley Equipment Open bowrider with no enclosed galley, but rigged for full days on the water with dual molded-in ice chests and a built-in 3.5-gallon trash receptacle. Deck and Hull Equipment Cobalt Kevlar-reinforced hull with composite transom and fiberglass stringer system; 24'3" length overall, 8'6" beam, white hull sides and bottom. Swim platform with patented flip-down swim step and white extension, stainless tubular perimeter rail, and stainless bow scuff plate. Powered windlass with all-chain anchor and anchor locker, midship cleats, stainless ski pylon, stainless windshield braces and top trim, stainless docking lights, four fender clips with lines, flagpole, and Transhield cover. Ceramic coated in 2023 and again in 2026. Navigation Systems Upgraded dual oversized Garmin 8610 glass-cockpit displays with GPS/chartplotter navigation and depth and water-temperature readouts, illuminated switch panel, and full gauge package with hour meter. Additional Equipment Premium sound system with transom and arch speakers plus a six-speaker Bluetooth setup with app-based remote and iPod/USB/MP3 input. Wireless phone charger, LED storage-compartment lighting, LED transom model designator, manual fire extinguisher, and ignition safety switch. Trailer included, with four new tires fitted in the last 30 days. Powered trim tabs with indicator at helm. Tilt steering. Cobalt's signature rear swim-step platform.

The F65 is the flagship of the F Class range. With a 65ft (20.3m) hull, contemporary lines and elongated windows, this luxury flybridge yacht is the perfect place to spend time with friends and family. Superior style meets exceptional practicality in the stunning F Class. A beautifully considered layout makes clever use of space to ensure life on board is effortless, while geometric design elements add to the contemporary style. It’s perfect for families. And ideal for entertaining. The F65 offers accommodation for eight guests across four cabins, all bathed in light thanks to the elongated hull windows. The expansive main deck is segmented into an aft galley with dinette and a saloon with a generous U-shaped sofa and companion seating opposite the helmsman area, with a side access door to the deck. Large panoramic saloon windows and signature wraparound front screens provide uninterrupted vistas wherever you sit. The foredeck is designed around outdoor relaxation, with split sunpads and the ability to include an integrated cool box. The contemporary flybridge forms the perfect outdoor entertaining area, with ergonomic dining seating, wetbar with barbecue, coolbox and sink, and an aft sunbed and L-shaped companion seat with infill as a secondary sunbed.

The Ocean Yachts 48 was created in response to numerous requests from our superyacht customers to create a boat that combined the benefits of our existing models with inboard diesel power. The 48 is available as a fully open boat or with an enclosed pilothouse. We invite you to explore what makes the boat so unique. The enclosed pilothouse version of the 48 features an air-conditioned upper salon with a full glass enclosure surrounding the helm and passenger seating area. This climate-controlled haven offers panoramic views and allows you to operate the boat in any type of weather conditions that you might encounter during your outings on the water. Gone are the days of hesitating to enjoy a lunch or dinner cruise aboard your center console boat out of fear that it might storm on your way home. The lower cabin of the 48 can be reached from the upper salon without ever having to venture outside and includes a restroom and shower along with a two-person bed that is oriented fore and aft so that you don’t have to resist the running angle of the boat while underway. If you require additional accommodations, the seating area in the upper salon can be used as a single bed since that is a climate-controlled area. The large cockpit and forward sun pad provide ample outdoor space when the weather is nice and we offer the option of additional seating in both of those areas. There is also a refrigerator, freezer, grill, and sink option available for the cockpit area which, combined with the diesel generator, enables the boat to be completely self-sufficient so that you could easily spend a few nights aboard the boat on a remote island. While the Ocean Yachts 48 is an ideal boat for standalone use, it was designed specifically to serve as the ultimate multipurpose superyacht tender. You can fish and dive from the 48 in the morning and then ferry guests to shore later that evening while keeping them sheltered from the elements. The boat can also be used to provide accommodations for extra crew. If you have additional cargo needs, our 48 SUV model features a removable mezzanine seat and removable carbon fiber davits that allow you to transport waverunners, provisions, or other large items in the boat’s cockpit. In addition to the focus on comfort, the 48 continues our longstanding obsession with safety. The 48 was designed with high gunnel walls, wide passageways, and a single level deck from bow to cockpit in order to allow safe and easy access to all areas of the boat. The helm was designed so that the captain can see over the bow even when the sun pad is occupied which is unique compared to almost any other center console boat with a sun pad integrated into the front of the console. We have also incorporated many redundant systems as an added measure of protection. Finally, our industry pioneering “Navigator Station” puts a third Garmin screen across the aisle from the helm so that another person can watch the FLIR or radar feed, enter a waypoint, or change the radio without ever distracting the captain. Literally no expense is spared in the construction of our boats. We use only the finest components available and our attention to detail goes far beyond what you will find with almost any other center console manufacturer. Our goal is to make your boating experience as enjoyable as possible so we offer our Global Maintenance Service. Ocean Yachts will fly our technicians anywhere in the world if your boat ever needs repairs (travel charges apply). Every one of our boats is built for a specific customer and the Ocean Yachts 48 is HIGHLY customizable so we can create just about any layout imaginable for you. We can tailor the boat toward more of a fishing-oriented setup with large livewells, a tackle prep station, and a tower or, if you prefer more of a cruising configuration, we can eliminate the tower and include our optional transom sofa. We also offer a completely open version of the boat or our Euro Version which replaces a portion of the upper salon with a large rear-facing sunpad. A RIB option is available on any of the configurations if desired.

Evan Marshall and his team took their extensive knowledge of Ocean Alexander and masterfully revolutionized our legacy. Powerful engines. Unwavering safety. Luxurious spaces. Breathtaking views. They transformed everything without sacrificing anything. Prepare to blow everyone away at the dock with her sleek new design. The new full-width main deck expands living space without compromising the incredible performance and efficiency we’re known for. Picture it: making your way from the massive on-deck master to grab a martini from the new wet-bar island in the salon. You take a deep breath, marveling at the near 360° view of the sunset coming through the massive floor-to-ceiling windows. Then, you sit back and gaze at the stars over the endless sea from the newly designed beach house.

The Ocean Yachts 70 is the new flagship of our fleet and will be the largest and most luxurious yacht we’ve ever built. The design combines the comforts of a convertible sportfishing yacht with the benefits of a center console boat in order to provide an unmatchable fishing and cruising experience. The 70 incorporates all of the popular features of our acclaimed 52 foot model and introduces even more amenities. The result is an extremely unique yacht that can be used for a wide variety of activities while allowing passengers to enjoy numerous indoor and outdoor spaces throughout the vessel. The most distinguishing feature of the Ocean Yachts 70 is the air-conditioned pilothouse with full 360 degree walkaround capability. The pilothouse includes a spacious salon with a massive u-shaped sofa, a table that can be lowered with the touch of a button to create and additional bed, and two individual chairs. The pop-up television helps create the perfect spot to relax and escape the elements while still being able to observe what is happening in the cockpit. As you move forward you will find the centrally located helm and, in front of that, a large passenger seating area offering panoramic views of the world outside. The entire upper salon was designed specifically to be on a single level in order to create a harmonious space where everyone can be together. The lower deck can be reached without ever having to venture outside so that passengers can remain in the climate-controlled haven until they chose to exit. A center stair leads to that lower level which features a private master stateroom with an ensuite head and separate shower, two private guest staterooms, an additional restroom with an enclosed shower serving the two guest staterooms, and a galley with a sink, cooktop, refrigerator, wine refrigerator, coffee bar and a microwave. There is also an outdoor galley in the cockpit complete with a grill, sink, refrigerators, and freezers. Alternately, the Ocean Yachts 70 is offered with the optional Galley Up configuration. Choosing this option creates room for either a lounge seating area or an additional rod storage room on the lower level. The 70 provides numerous areas for outdoor enjoyment. The large cockpit with shaded mezzanine seating and the dining area in the bow offer ample open-air space and we also offer the option of even more seating in those areas if desired. The switchable glass on the rear window allows you to make the glass opaque which transforms it into a massive video screen viewable from the cockpit for displaying movies, television, or any of the feeds from the Garmin displays. The standing height mechanical room is accessible from the cockpit provides easy access to all of the boat’s major systems. The space also includes a significant amount of rod storage in addition to the rod storage found inside of the pilothouse. The recommend power for the Ocean Yachts 70 is either five or six Mercury V12 600 horsepower outboard motors. The option of two inboard diesel inboard motors is available. Ocean Yachts collaborated with renowned superyacht designers Setzer Yacht Architects to create the 70 with the goal of making it an excellent standalone boat or the ultimate multipurpose yacht tender. You can fish and dive from the 70 in the morning and then ferry guests to shore in their evening wear later that day while keeping them sheltered from the elements. The boat can also be used to provide accommodations for extra crew. Every one of our boats is built for a specific customer and the Ocean Yachts 70 is HIGHLY customizable so we can create just about any layout imaginable for you. We can tailor the boat toward more of a fishing-oriented layout with larger livewells and a flybridge or, if you prefer more of a cruising configuration, we can eliminate the flybridge and include our transom sofa option. The 70 is also available in a completely open configuration which would, in that case, make it the world’s largest center console boat. In addition to the focus on comfort, the 70 remains true to our longstanding obsession with safety. The boat is built using our foam filled construction techniques to provide extra buoyancy and was designed with high gunnel walls and wide passageways to allow safe and easy access to all areas of the boat. The protected ladder with spiral lower treads leading up to the flybridge provides safer and easier access to that area. The helm was designed so that the captain can see over the bow from the lower helm station even when the sunpad is occupied which is fairly unique compared to almost any other boat with a sunpad integrated into the front of the console. We have incorporated many redundant systems as an added measure of protection. Finally, our industry pioneering “Navigator Station” puts two additional Garmin screens at the seating area across the aisle from the helm so a another person can watch the FLIR or radar, enter a waypoint, operate equipment via the digital switching system, or change the music source or video feeds without distracting the captain. The standard equipment list on the 70 includes just about every option that most users would ever want such as the air-conditioned solid glass enclosure, two Seakeeper gyro stabilizers, choice of either two large livewells or our integrated transom bench with slightly reduced capacity livewells underneath, electric bow thruster, five air conditioners, two side dive doors, two heavy duty dive ladders, electric anchor windlass, multiple freezers and refrigerators, outdoor grill, a galley, LED underwater and courtesy lights, two diesel generators, battery charger, two heads with separate showers, fresh and salt water washdowns, quadruple Garmin chartplotters, Garmin open array radar, Fusion marine stereo and much more.

They think of brilliant ways to use space, innovative solutions for crew access, but most of all, they consider the way you and your guests will enjoy every moment on an exceptional yacht like the 32L. Ocean Alexander’s 32L motoryacht comes with a magnificent open flybridge or a spacious skylounge. This five-stateroom yacht is a luxurious entertaining spot where sunsets and sunrises can fill the huge windows and immerse you and your guests in the wonders of nature. An on-deck master provides the owner with an oasis uniquely their own. Our use of inventive aluminum-beam engineering to bring you the most impressive window views of any yachts this size. We’ve scaled living space upward in the 32L using strategies usually found only in megayachts. With increased spaces in the galley and crew area, the Ocean Alexander 32L is perfect for private ownership or charter. The 32L motoryacht is full of possibilities. Come see them for yourself.

The Sylvan R-22 CLZ pontoon is the epitome of family-friendly boating, offering an array of features designed to enhance your time on the water. With its power bimini top, you can easily adjust for shade or sunshine, ensuring comfort for everyone aboard this spacious pontoon. Wrap-around bow couches maximize seating capacity, providing ample space for family gatherings and leisurely cruises, and the swingback stern seating allows for forward or rear facing cruising. Additionally, the convenient four-step telescoping ladder makes boarding and disembarking from this pontoon a breeze, perfect for swimming adventures or simply enjoying the water. Whether you're seeking relaxation or excitement, the Sylvan R-22 CLZ pontoon is your ideal companion for unforgettable moments on the water with your loved ones.
